news_items.headline: Twins GM shuts down Buxton trade rumors
Back-to-back-to-back! Homer-happy Astros power up to spoil Bieber's return
Jays Blow Comeback, Lose 9-7 in 11 Innings
news_items.summary: It wasn’t the triumphant return we’d hoped for from the Biebs. When a command guy like Shane Bieber isn’t hitting his spots, it can turn into batting practice pretty quickly. That’s about what happened here. He was catching too much of the plate too often, and Houston’s hitters teed off. Combined with the rare Tyler […]

news_items.headline: Colorado Rockies vs. Boston Red Sox game discussion: Sonny Gray vs Sean Sullivan
news_items.summary: A win tonight would cement a series win and send the Red Sox to last place in the Rockies’ stead.

news_items.headline: Buster Posey faces the music as Giants struggles, controversies mount
news_items.summary: The San Francisco Giants' president of baseball operations was peppered with questions about the controversies surrounding his foundering ballclub.

news_items.headline: Dodgers vs. Twins game chat
news_items.summary: Three solo home runs accounted for all of the scoring on Monday. Let’s see how the Dodgers and Twins come to their offense on Tuesday. Tuesday game info

news_items.headline: Kyle Schwarber scratched from Phillies lineup. What we know about injury
news_items.summary: The indomitable DH, whose 29 home runs lead the major leagues, entered a series against the Nationals on a significant heater, but was scratched.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Arizona Diamondbacks Tuesday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals continue their streak of 7 home games-in-a-row with game 2 against the Arizona Diamondbacks Tuesday night. Kyle Leahy gets the start for the Cardinals while the Diamondbacks are scheduled to start LHP Eduardo Rodriguez. First pitch is scheduled for 6:45pm central time at Busch Stadium and the broadcast will be available […]
